name: ultra-memory
description: Project-agnostic agent-memory engine + read-only knowledge MCP for Claude Code. SQLite-canonical volatile memory with a single audited write gateway, OAuth-only LLM chokepoint, session checkpoint/rehydration hooks, and a type-scoped knowledge_query MCP tool. Code-only and content-free — your data/config stay private in the consumer project.

data_db_path.title: Canonical memory.db path
data_db_path.description: Optional override. Leave empty to auto-derive: <project>/data/memory.db (project/local install), or ~/.ultra-memory/memory.db (user-scope).

caller_class.title: Knowledge-MCP caller class
caller_class.description: Privilege class for knowledge-MCP recall. Fail-closed: 'subagent' => project/reference facts only. Set 'orchestrator' only on a trusted top-level instance.

rehydrate_budget.title: Rehydration gist budget (chars)
rehydrate_budget.description: Character budget for the SessionStart rehydration gist.

oauth_token.title: Claude OAuth token (optional)
oauth_token.description: OAuth token, NEVER an ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Only needed if a consumer runs LLM maintenance; the memory maintenance slice (prune+export) does not use it.
